review_method.reviewer_context_boundary: Reviewer received only image paths and visual expectations; no code, manifest internals, or implementation details were supplied.

per_image_review.label: A
per_image_review.visible_evidence: The beaker is centered, visible, and identifiable. Red leak evidence is clearly visible as bright red pooled markers directly under/around the beaker bottom. Framing, lighting, and scale are useful for PM/leadership review.
per_image_review.main_risk: The red markers are review-only visualization derived from readback positions; physics classification must still come from particle readback counts.

per_image_review.label: B
per_image_review.visible_evidence: The projection clearly shows the source beaker region in blue and red sampled leak points as a dense red band below/near the beaker footprint. The count text is visible enough for explanation.
per_image_review.main_risk: This is a diagnostic projection, not a product RGB render or visual/material parity image.

allowed: The terminal RGB camera frame is visually useful for leadership review of the completed-PBD static leak evidence.
The terminal diagnostic projection is visually useful for explaining the readback leak counts.
blocked: Do not use visual review alone as the physics classifier.
Do not claim the red review markers are simulated fluid mesh or physical colliders.
Do not claim product-level visual/material parity from these images.
Do not claim benchmark readiness, S3 pouring, S4 replay, policy score, or official leaderboard status.
